name: Navo Table Lamp - 13.25 Inch Height - TBL4234 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the elegant NAVO table lamp. Standing at 13.25 inches, this sleek lamp adds a modern touch to any room. Crafted from sturdy iron, its black finish provides a versatile look that complements any decor. The NAVO table lamp is perfect for your bedside, office, or living room, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere. Its compact and stylish design makes it a standout piece that seamlessly fits into smaller spaces. Transform your home or workspace with this beautiful lighting solution and enjoy the ambient glow it provides.
